STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM MARK SCHREIBER FILED BY SERRES, JORGE WORKERS COMPENSATION INSURANCE RATING BUREAU

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-06-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-06-2009 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: MARK SCHREIBER. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
LETTER OF AUTHORIZATION FROM DEFENDANT REGARDING EXHIBITS. FILED BY DEFENDANT WORKERS COMPENSATION INSURANCE RATING BUREAU AS TO PLAINTIFF SERRES, JORGE

DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT WORKERS COMPENSATION INSURANCE RATING BUREAU

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SERRES, JORGE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WORKERS COMPENSATION INSURANCE RATING BUREAU $840.45 PRINCIPAL, $45.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $885.45, *THE COURT FINDS THAT THE MEDICAL EXAM FOR WHICH REIMBURSEMENT IS REQUESTED WAS INCURRED IN OBEDIENCE TO THE DIRECTIONS OF THE DEFENDANT'S EMPLOYER AS THE PLAINTIFF WAS INSTRUCTED TO OBTAIN EXAM WITHOUT DELAY BY A COMPANY EXECUTIVE, AND RETURN WITH A DOCTOR'S NOTE SHOWING HE HAD DONE SO; E.G. DECLARATION OF MELLIN DATED 4/13/09. ACCORDINGLY, DEFENDANT SHALL REIMBURSE PLAINTIFF FOR THE COST OF THE EXAM, PER CAL. LABOR CODE 2802. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO PLAINTIFF SERRES, JORGE ADDITIONAL DEFENDANT EXHIBITS, (W/AUTHORIZATION LETTER FROM THE PLAINTIFF.)
